name: grofast
description: GroFast — hyperlocal quick-commerce grocery delivery platform

scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test

pnpm.//: Overrides force patched versions of dev-only transitives flagged by `pnpm audit`. Both are dev-tooling (glob via @nestjs/cli + coverage; vite via vitest) and never ship in the production image, which carries prod deps only. Remove an entry once the parent dependency ships the patched version natively.
